name: anna-app-mini-notes
description: Mini Notes with LLM Summary - Anna App

scripts.executa:invoke: anna-app executa dev --dir executas/notes-summarizer --mock-sampling fixtures/sampling-mock.jsonl --invoke summarize_notes --args "{\"notes\":[{\"order\":1,\"content\":\"츠莖뫄와빵 follow up\"},{\"order\":2,\"content\":\"錦릿되쩌 bug\"}]}"
